description_long: This is a well-worn hardcover book with a white dust jacket featuring large, bold text on the front cover. The book is open, revealing slightly yellowed pages and a visible library card pocket with checkout slips attached to the inside cover. The spine and edges of the dust jacket show signs of wear, with some discoloration and minor tears. The book sits on a dark, flat surface, and the interior pages are densely printed with text. The overall appearance suggests it is a frequently handled library book, with a utilitarian and academic feel. The book's substantial thickness and visible binding indicate it is a lengthy volume.
description: A thick, white-jacketed hardcover book with visible wear, open to reveal library cards and aged pages. The cover features bold, modern typography and the book exudes a scholarly, well-used character.
description_view_0: The book is open with its pages fanned out, showing the inside text and the edge of the library card pocket.
description_view_1: The back cover and spine are visible, displaying worn edges and library markings.
description_view_2: The front cover is fully visible, showing bold, large text and the white dust jacket.
description_view_3: The book is partially open, highlighting the library card pocket and checkout slips inside the front cover.
attribute_title_text: UMBERTO ECO TRAVELS IN HYPER REALITY
attribute_spine_design: The spine is white with a faded red border, showing visible wear and some discoloration. Text is present but partially obscured by the angle and wear.
